title: Validate T-Deck ST7789 display node parameters
description: Verify the disabled Zephyr ST7789/MIPI-DBI node parameters for the LilyGO T-Deck panel before enabling display support. Confirm width/height, orientation, offsets, ST7789 init values, mipi-max-frequency, reset absence, DC GPIO11, BL GPIO42, and LVGL/display chosen-node requirements against LilyGO/Meshtastic source and physical boot logs. Acceptance: app overlay can enable display without LoRa CS interference; visual smoke confirms orientation/colors/backlight; any panel revision differences become board/overlay follow-ups.
notes:
No-hardware implementation/evidence 2026-07-02:

Added optional explicit T-Deck gateway display validation fragments:
- lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.conf
- lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.overlay

These fragments are intentionally passed via EXTRA_CONF_FILE and EXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE, not FILE_SUFFIX=display, so the normal gateway board policy remains loaded. The overlay enables the disabled tdeck_mipi_dbi and tdeck_display nodes, adds zephyr,display = &tdeck_display, and deletes only the TFT CS hog so SPI3 owns display CS1 while the SD CS hog remains asserted inactive.

Source checks used for DTS parameters:
- Meshtastic T-Deck device docs: 2.8-inch ST7789 SPI IPS LCD, 320x240; ESP32-S3FN16R8.
- Meshtastic firmware variant.h raw source: TFT_CS=12, ST7789_RS/DC=11, ST7789_BL=42, TFT_WIDTH=240, TFT_HEIGHT=320, offsets 0, SPI frequency 40000000, SD CS=39, LoRa pins.
- LilyGO T-Deck UnitTest utilities.h raw source: TFT CS=12, DC=11, backlight=42, SPI MOSI=41/MISO=38/SCK=40, SD CS=39, radio pins.

EC2 validation environment:
- Instance i-0f1206528e0551fee, us-east-2a, Ubuntu 22.04, profile AdministratorAccess-921772462201.
- EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr; env sourced from /mnt/lichen-zephyr/env.sh.

Corrected invalid board target first observed as a failed command:
- west build -p always -b t_deck_esp32s3_procpu lichen/apps/gateway ... failed because canonical board target is t_deck/esp32s3/procpu.

Baseline default gateway build PASS:
- west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build-tdeck-gateway-default-st7789 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen
- Memory: FLASH 214740 B / 16776960 B (1.28%); iram0_0_seg 51484 B / 329 KB (15.28%); dram0_0_seg 99592 B / 313 KB (31.07%); irom0_0_seg 116462 B / 16 MB (0.69%); drom0_0_seg 149204 B / 16 MB (0.89%).
- Expected/pre-existing warning: CMake 'No SOURCES given to Zephyr library: drivers__net; Excluding target from build.'
- Default config kept display off: '# CONFIG_DISPLAY is not set' and '# CONFIG_MIPI_DBI is not set'.

Display validation build PASS after FILE_SUFFIX review fix:
- west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build-tdeck-gateway-display-st7789-v2 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.conf -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.overlay
- CMake merge order confirmed additive: prj.conf -> boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf -> boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.conf; base app overlay plus validation overlay both loaded.
- Memory: FLASH 215196 B / 16776960 B (1.28%); iram0_0_seg 51484 B / 329 KB (15.28%); dram0_0_seg 99672 B / 313 KB (31.10%); irom0_0_seg 117918 B / 16 MB (0.70%); drom0_0_seg 149660 B / 16 MB (0.89%).
- Expected/pre-existing warning: CMake 'No SOURCES given to Zephyr library: drivers__net; Excluding target from build.'
- Build compiled drivers/mipi_dbi/mipi_dbi_spi.c and drivers/display/display_st7789v.c.
- Config inspection confirmed product policy retained and display enabled: CONFIG_LICHEN_BOARD_NAME="LilyGO T-Deck", CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, '# CONFIG_SLIP is not set', CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_DISPLAY=y, CONFIG_DISPLAY=y, CONFIG_ST7789V=y, CONFIG_ST7789V_RGB565=y, CONFIG_MIPI_DBI=y, CONFIG_MIPI_DBI_SPI=y.
- Devicetree inspection confirmed chosen has both zephyr,lora = &lora0 and zephyr,display = &tdeck_display; tdeck_mipi_dbi and tdeck_display status okay; TFT CS hog removed; SD CS hog remains with GPIO_ACTIVE_LOW/output-low; ST7789 parameters include width 240, height 320, x/y offsets 0, mipi-max-frequency 0x02625a00 (40000000), mdac 0, colmod 0x55, and existing init tables.

Review evidence:
- Explorer found active-low GPIO hog semantics risk in an earlier local attempt; reverted the board DTS change before committing.
- Reviewer 1 initially found P1 active-low CS hog regression; fixed by leaving base board DTS unchanged. Re-review: no P0/P1/P2.
- Reviewer 2 initially found P1/P2 FILE_SUFFIX replacement risk; fixed by renaming fragments to *_display_validation and documenting explicit CMake use. Re-review: no P0/P1/P2.
- Reviewer 3 independently found the same FILE_SUFFIX replacement risk; re-review after rename: no P0/P1/P2.

Deferred hardware evidence:
- Created and blocked child project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.17.1 for physical T-Deck ST7789 visual smoke/orientation/colors/backlight/shared-SPI validation. No physical hardware was available in this no-hardware session.
EC2 cleanup completed 2026-07-02: synced and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr; detached vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited until volume state available; terminated i-0f1206528e0551fee; deleted temporary security group sg-050fa95b01a092275.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware T-Deck ST7789 validation. Added explicit gateway display validation conf/overlay fragments, validated additive Kconfig/devicetree behavior and ESP32-S3 Zephyr build on EC2, recorded memory/warnings/review evidence, and split physical visual smoke/orientation/backlight/shared-SPI validation to blocked child project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.17.1.
